body: Builder-Scout operated solo on Codex's queue. Rebuilt the graveyard index DB to apply P-G1 PII scrub. Hardened dan_pre_publish_gate by porting it to a precision Python scanner relying on contains_secret_shape. Finished the Advanced Register MVP (H4) by building register_systemd.py that leverages the salvaged SafeShellValidator and writes to the TamperEvidentLedgerWriter. All 427 tests are passing and fail-closed invariants are intact.
